context.goal: Accumulate one full boundary-value group and observe the width-sensitive output closure.

context.goal: Use gaps in valid-like gating and confirm that only asserted valid cycles contribute to grouped accumulation.

context.goal: Reset mid-accumulation and confirm partial state is cleared before a later full group completes.
stimulus_intent: Apply a partial valid group, assert reset, then drive one later full valid group.
End with valid-like gating quiesced so any later output event is attributable only to the post-reset group.
timing_assumptions: Advance through conservative clocked observations.
Do not assume completion before it becomes externally visible.
Reset remains the only allowed state-clear event in this case.

context.goal: Drive multiple complete valid groups in one finite stream and require repeated output-closure behavior.

timing_assumptions: Advance through conservative clocked observations.
Do not assume completion before it becomes externally visible.
Repeated grouped outputs are checked event-wise, not by assuming exact inter-group latency.

unresolved_items: Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: If the start signal is inactive (!start), the shift count register (i) is reset to 0.
Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: If the shift count register (i) is equal to 17, the multiplication completion flag (done_r) is reset to 0.
